title: Resolve, Authorizing the Commissioner of Administrative and Financial Services to Convey the Interests of the State in Certain Real Property in East Millinocket
last_house_action: 3/24/2026 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Committee on AGRICULTURE, CONSERVATION AND FORESTRY suggested and ordered printed. On motion by Senator TALBOT ROSS of Cumberland REFERENCE to the Committee on STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on STATE AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE. ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.
COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
